summary: This is a brief announcement post noting that Joel on Software has launched a Russian translation, with seven articles initially available. Joel thanks the eleven translators and editors who contributed to the effort and notes that more translated articles are forthcoming.
key_points: Joel on Software launched a Russian language version with 7 translated articles
The translation was a community effort involving 11 volunteer translators and editors
The project demonstrates the international reach and appeal of Joel's writing
money_quotes: Joel on Software in Russian is now live with the first 7 articles.
key_insight: This is a minor announcement post about the Russian translation of Joel on Software, with no substantive technical or business content.
